title: tricyrtis ohsumiensis
intro: Tricyrtis ohsumiensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Colchicaceae, commonly known as the autumnal lady's tresses. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as acting as an antacid to soothe digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the rhizome and roots of Tricyrtis ohsumiensis are used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
